name: ChatGPT
description: Conversational AI model by OpenAI for text generation, coding help, research and analysis.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant designed for safety, longer context windows and nuanced reasoning.

name: Hugging Face
description: Open-source hub for ML models, datasets and inference spaces for the community.

name: Gemini
description: Google's multimodal AI model for text, images, code and data understanding.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer that suggests code completions, reviews, and chat inside your editor.

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor for vibe coding — describe what you want in natural language and the AI writes, edits, and refactors your codebase conversationally.

name: Amazon CodeWhisperer
description: AWS-powered AI code companion for real-time suggestions and security scanning.

name: Tabnine
description: AI code assistant with private model options for enterprise-grade code completion.

name: AutoGen
description: Microsoft framework for building multi-agent conversational AI systems.

name: CrewAI
description: Framework for orchestrating role-playing autonomous AI agents working together.

name: Zapier AI
description: No-code AI-powered workflow automation connecting 5,000+ apps and services.

name: LangChain
description: Framework for building applications powered by language models with chaining and memory.

name: Semantic Kernel
description: Microsoft's SDK for integrating LLMs into apps with planners, memory and plugins.

name: PromptFlow
description: Azure tool to design, test and deploy prompt workflows with evaluation built in.

name: MLflow
description: Open-source platform for the complete machine learning lifecycle management.

name: Weights & Biases
description: ML experiment tracking, model versioning and dataset visualization platform.

name: BentoML
description: Framework for serving, deploying and scaling ML models as production APIs.

name: Midjourney
description: AI image generation tool that creates visuals from natural language prompts.

name: Figma AI
description: AI-powered design features inside Figma for layout generation and auto-suggestions.

name: Pinecone
description: Managed vector database for building fast and scalable semantic search applications.

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI search engine that provides sourced, conversational answers to complex questions.

name: Coursera AI Courses
description: Curated learning paths and specializations covering AI, ML and deep learning.

name: Guardrails AI
description: Framework for adding safety, validation and structure to LLM outputs.

name: Azure AI Content Safety
description: Cloud service for detecting harmful content in text and images generated by AI.

name: Testim
description: AI-powered end-to-end test automation that self-heals and adapts to UI changes.

name: Applitools
description: Visual AI testing platform for cross-browser and cross-device UI validation.

name: Jasper
description: AI content platform for marketing teams — generates copy, blogs, ads and brand content.

name: Grammarly
description: AI writing assistant for grammar, tone, clarity and style across any profession.

name: Notion AI
description: AI built into Notion for summarizing, drafting, brainstorming and organizing knowledge.

name: Tableau AI
description: AI-powered analytics and data visualization for business insights and decision-making.

name: Harvey AI
description: AI assistant built for legal work — contract review, research, drafting and compliance.

name: Notebook LM
description: Google's AI-powered research and podcast tool — transforms documents, articles and notes into conversational audio summaries and deep-dive podcasts.

name: Descript
description: AI-powered audio and video editor with transcription, overdub, filler word removal and studio sound — ideal for podcast production.

name: ElevenLabs
description: AI voice generation and cloning platform — create realistic voiceovers, narrations and podcast audio with natural-sounding AI voices.

name: Google AI Essentials
description: Free beginner-friendly course by Google covering AI fundamentals, prompt engineering and responsible AI — no coding required.

name: Elements of AI
description: Free online course by University of Helsinki — learn what AI is, what it can do, and how it affects everyday life. Built for non-technical learners.

name: Microsoft AI for Beginners
description: Free 12-week open-source curriculum by Microsoft covering AI fundamentals, neural networks, NLP, and computer vision with hands-on labs.

name: ChatGPT Prompt Library
description: Curated collection of ready-to-use prompt templates for various roles and use cases — perfect for anyone getting started with AI assistants.

name: Vercel
description: Cloud platform for deploying web applications instantly — free for personal projects with automatic HTTPS, CDN, and preview URLs.

name: Windsurf (Codeium)
description: AI-powered code editor for vibe coding — describe features in natural language and the autonomous AI agent writes, runs, and iterates on your code.

name: Ollama
description: Run open-source LLMs locally on your machine — Llama, Mistral, Phi, and more. No cloud, no API key, full privacy.

name: v0 by Vercel
description: AI-powered UI generator — describe a component or page in natural language and get production-ready React/Tailwind code instantly. The gateway drug to vibe coding.

name: Replit
description: Cloud IDE with AI agent — describe your app idea and Replit Agent builds, previews, and deploys it from your browser. No local setup needed.

name: Bolt.new
description: AI-powered full-stack app builder — describe your app idea and get a working prototype deployed in minutes, entirely in the browser. Pure vibe coding.

name: Streamlit
description: Python framework for building interactive data apps and AI demos in minutes — the go-to tool for data scientists to share their work.

name: Gradio
description: Python library for building ML demos and web UIs with just a few lines of code — widely used on Hugging Face Spaces.

name: AWS Bedrock
description: Amazon's managed service for accessing foundation models (Claude, Llama, Titan) via API — with enterprise security, fine-tuning, and RAG built in.

name: Google Vertex AI
description: Google Cloud's unified AI platform for building, deploying, and scaling ML and generative AI applications with Gemini models.

name: Azure AI Studio
description: Microsoft's unified platform for building AI applications — access OpenAI models, deploy RAG pipelines, and manage AI projects with enterprise governance.

name: Runway
description: AI-powered video generation and editing — create, extend, and transform video with text prompts. Used by filmmakers and content creators.

name: Suno
description: AI music generator — create full songs with vocals, instruments, and lyrics from a text prompt. No musical experience needed.

name: n8n
description: Open-source workflow automation platform with AI capabilities — connect apps, APIs, and AI models into automated workflows with a visual builder.

name: LM Studio
description: Desktop app for running open-source LLMs locally with a ChatGPT-like interface — discover, download, and chat with models offline.

name: Perplexity Pages
description: AI-powered research and publishing tool — create shareable, well-sourced articles on any topic with AI-assisted research and writing.

name: Lovable
description: AI-powered full-stack app builder — describe your idea in plain English and get a working, deployable app with frontend, backend, and database. Formerly GPT Engineer.

name: Devin
description: Autonomous AI software engineer by Cognition — handles complex coding tasks end-to-end, from planning and implementation to debugging and deployment.
